stage_round_1.ego: If they laugh, let them laugh at the version of you that walked in. Not the one leaving.
stage_round_1.creativity: There. That phrase. Pull that thread and make the room wear it.
stage_round_1.attention: They are with you. Which is another way of saying they are above you, leaning in.

stage_round_2.ego: You can take this. You've taken worse.
stage_round_2.creativity: There's a counter-melody forming. You can hear it.
stage_round_2.attention: The crowd is watching. Every eye is fuel.

stage_round_3.ego: Still standing. That's a verse in itself.
stage_round_3.creativity: One more line. Make it the one they can't unhear.
stage_round_3.attention: The room is yours. The question is what you do with the keys.
